channel.title: VivahGo Guides
channel.description: Indian wedding planning guides from VivahGo, including checklists, timelines, budgets, guests, vendors, and destination planning.

item.title: Indian Wedding Planning Checklist
item.description: A practical checklist for organizing ceremonies, budgets, family decisions, and vendors without losing the thread. Read a practical Indian wedding planning checklist covering ceremony sequencing, family coordination, vendor planning, budget checkpoints, and guest workflow.
item.dc:creator: VivahGo
item.content:encoded:
A practical checklist for organizing ceremonies, budgets, family decisions, and vendors without losing the thread.

Read a practical Indian wedding planning checklist covering ceremony sequencing, family coordination, vendor planning, budget checkpoints, and guest workflow.

Read the full guide at https://vivahgo.com/guides/indian-wedding-checklist.

item.title: Punjabi Wedding Timeline Guide
item.description: Map roka, mehndi, sangeet, baraat, anand karaj, and reception into one coordinated planning flow. Plan a Punjabi wedding timeline with guidance for roka, mehndi, sangeet, baraat, anand karaj, reception, family logistics, and vendor coordination.
item.dc:creator: VivahGo
item.content:encoded:
Map roka, mehndi, sangeet, baraat, anand karaj, and reception into one coordinated planning flow.

Plan a Punjabi wedding timeline with guidance for roka, mehndi, sangeet, baraat, anand karaj, reception, family logistics, and vendor coordination.

Read the full guide at https://vivahgo.com/guides/punjabi-wedding-timeline.

item.title: Indian Wedding Budget Planning Guide
item.description: Break venue, decor, catering, rituals, travel, and vendor payments into a cleaner budget process. Use this Indian wedding budget planning guide to organize venue, decor, catering, rituals, travel, attire, and vendor payment tracking.
item.dc:creator: VivahGo
item.content:encoded:
Break venue, decor, catering, rituals, travel, and vendor payments into a cleaner budget process.

Use this Indian wedding budget planning guide to organize venue, decor, catering, rituals, travel, attire, and vendor payment tracking.

Read the full guide at https://vivahgo.com/guides/wedding-budget-planner.

item.title: Guest List and RSVP Guide
item.description: Keep family sides, follow-ups, guest counts, and invitation responses aligned in one system. Manage wedding guest lists and RSVPs with a cleaner process for family sides, follow-ups, invitation status, rooming, and final counts.
item.dc:creator: VivahGo
item.content:encoded:
Keep family sides, follow-ups, guest counts, and invitation responses aligned in one system.

Manage wedding guest lists and RSVPs with a cleaner process for family sides, follow-ups, invitation status, rooming, and final counts.

Read the full guide at https://vivahgo.com/guides/guest-list-rsvp.

item.title: Wedding Vendor Coordination Guide
item.description: Track photographers, decorators, venues, pandits, choreographers, transport, and entertainment vendors together. Coordinate wedding vendors with a structured approach for booking, timelines, deliverables, payment checkpoints, and event-day alignment.
item.dc:creator: VivahGo
item.content:encoded:
Track photographers, decorators, venues, pandits, choreographers, transport, and entertainment vendors together.

Coordinate wedding vendors with a structured approach for booking, timelines, deliverables, payment checkpoints, and event-day alignment.

Read the full guide at https://vivahgo.com/guides/vendor-coordination.

item.title: Destination Wedding Planning in India
item.description: Plan multi-event weddings across Jaipur, Udaipur, Goa, Delhi NCR, Mumbai, and other high-intent wedding cities. Plan destination weddings in India with guidance for venue clusters, guest movement, room blocks, transport, hospitality, and multi-event timelines.
item.dc:creator: VivahGo
item.content:encoded:
Plan multi-event weddings across Jaipur, Udaipur, Goa, Delhi NCR, Mumbai, and other high-intent wedding cities.

Plan destination weddings in India with guidance for venue clusters, guest movement, room blocks, transport, hospitality, and multi-event timelines.

Read the full guide at https://vivahgo.com/guides/destination-weddings.
